name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: Healthy deshi cow suitable for Qurbani. Well fed with natural grass and organic food. Vaccinated and vet-certified. Ideal for families looking for a mid-range Qurbani animal.

name: Sahiwal Premium Bull
description: Premium Sahiwal bull raised on a certified farm. Known for its strong build and high meat yield. Fully vaccinated, disease-free, and Qurbani-approved by veterinarian.

name: Friesian Giant Cow
description: Massive Friesian cow ideal for shared Qurbani among 7 persons. Farm-raised with premium feed. Comes with full health certificate and free doorstep delivery within Dhaka.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: Famous Black Bengal breed goat, perfect for individual Qurbani. Known for tender meat and compact size. Raised naturally with grass and hay. Healthy and active.

name: Jamuna Pair Goat
description: Well-built Jamuna goat with excellent body condition. Raised on organic farm in Sylhet highlands. Calm temperament, ideal for Qurbani. Vet-inspected and certified healthy.

name: Boer Premium Goat
description: Premium Boer goat known for high meat yield and muscular build. One of the most sought-after breeds for Qurbani. Vaccinated, farm-raised, and ready for pickup or delivery.

name: Deshi White Sheep
description: Pure white deshi sheep in excellent health. Suitable for Qurbani with proper age and weight. Calm and well-fed. Available for pickup from farm or delivery to your doorstep.

name: Brahman Giant Bull
description: Impressive Brahman bull with large hump and strong physique. Perfect for shared Qurbani among 7 families. Raised on a certified farm in Khulna. Full vet certificate included.
